description.en: Exploring how language is actually learned, and building a system from the ground up focused on perception and real understanding.
description.zh: 探索語言實際是如何被學習的，並從最底層建立一個以感知與真實理解為核心的學習系統。

description.en: Documenting my attempt to build a game from scratch with little experience. Learning by doing, experimenting in real time, and figuring things out along the way.
description.zh: 記錄我從零開始做遊戲的過程。在經驗不足的情況下，一邊做一邊學，透過實驗與嘗試逐步摸索方向。

description.en: Documenting my attempt to improve my body from the ground up—fixing weaknesses in movement, building strength, and developing a more complete physique.
description.zh: 記錄我從基礎開始重新打造身體的過程，修正動作上的弱點、提升力量，並建立更完整且均衡的體態。

description.en: Documenting my attempt to improve my Mandarin through real life in Taiwan: listening, speaking, pronunciation, accent, reading, and closing the gap between study and actual use.
description.zh: 記錄我在台灣透過真實生活提升中文的過程：聽力、口說、發音、口音、閱讀，以及縮短學習與實際使用之間的落差。

description.en: Improving my speaking and singing voice through breath, resonance, articulation, pitch, control, and expression.
description.zh: 記錄我透過呼吸、共鳴、咬字、音高、控制與表達來改善說話與唱歌聲音的過程。

description.en: Documenting my attempt to close the gaps between the programs I can build, the mathematics I have studied, and what I actually understand.
description.zh: 記錄我如何補上程式實作、學過的數學，以及真正理解之間的落差，重新建立更扎實的技術基礎。

description.en: Rebuilding rough game prototypes into more intentional games, starting with AS ONE v2.
description.zh: 記錄我如何把粗糙的遊戲原型重建成更有方向的作品，從 AS ONE v2 開始。
